scripts.demo:outbound: node scripts/sync-env.mjs && pnpm --dir apps/api-gateway exec tsx scripts/demo-outbound.ts
scripts.send:test: node scripts/sync-env.mjs && pnpm --dir apps/api-gateway exec tsx scripts/send-test.ts
scripts.stress:test: node scripts/sync-env.mjs && DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH="$(pwd)/.env" pnpm -C internal stress:test
scripts.worker:sender: node scripts/sync-env.mjs && DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH="$(pwd)/.env" pnpm -C workers/sender-worker worker:dev
scripts.worker:reputation: node scripts/sync-env.mjs && DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH="$(pwd)/.env" pnpm -C workers/reputation-worker worker:dev
scripts.worker:optimizer: node scripts/sync-env.mjs && DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH="$(pwd)/.env" pnpm -C workers/optimizer-worker worker:dev
scripts.worker:inbound: node scripts/sync-env.mjs && DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH="$(pwd)/.env" pnpm -C workers/inbound-worker worker:dev
